The '''Model 22T4 ISB Special''' was a model of [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]]<ref name="GG9" /> that was specifically manufactured and produced for the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. Agents were assigned a 22T4 after being accepted into the Bureau as a personal sidearm. Selling of this blaster to civilians was strictly prohibited by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and they strictly monitored the production of the weapon by placing a specially-coded serial number on all models under the [[Actuating module/Legends|actuating blaster module]].<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> This was also done to discourage tampering with the weapon.<ref name="AEG" /> The 22T4 was initially produced by the [[Imperial Arms]] company<ref name="GG9" /> before being produced by [[Imperial Munitions/Legends|Imperial Munitions]].<ref name="AEG" />
